description: Inspect the TLS/SSL certificates of five US government websites using Microsoft Edge: treasury.gov, ssa.gov, sec.gov, usa.gov, and cisa.gov. For each site, document the Certificate Issuer (CA), Validity Period (start/end dates), Public Key type/size (e.g., RSA 2048), and the TLS protocol version used. Save a structured audit report containing these details for all five websites to /home/ga/Desktop/tls_audit_report.txt.
